section.heading: Eligibility for annuity

content.p: Notwithstanding any other provision of this chapter, an employee or Member must complete at least 5 years of civilian service creditable under section 8411 in order to be eligible for an annuity under this subchapter.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 99–335, title I, § 101(a), June 6, 1986, 100 Stat. 522.)
